bookmarks.name: bookmarks
bookmarks.description: Save, search, and manage bookmarked links
bookmarks.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Save, search, and tag links without leaving the chat
marketplace.long_description: Never lose a useful link again. Save bookmarks with auto-fetched titles, organize them with hashtags, and search your collection instantly. Perfect for teams that share resources across WhatsApp conversations.

marketplace.tagline: Full calendar management from WhatsApp via CalDAV
marketplace.long_description: View your agenda, find free slots, and create events using natural language — all from WhatsApp. Supports recurring events, ICS imports, holiday syncing, and integrates with any CalDAV server like Radicale or Nextcloud.

calendar_briefing.name: calendar_briefing
calendar_briefing.description: Calendar briefing with tomorrow and week-ahead views
calendar_briefing.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Automated daily briefings and upcoming event reminders
marketplace.long_description: Start your day prepared with calendar briefings delivered straight to WhatsApp. Get tonight and tomorrow previews, week-ahead summaries, and automatic reminders before upcoming events so nothing slips through the cracks.

community.name: community
community.description: All-in-one WhatsApp community management — gamification, moderation, onboarding, analytics, roles, and scheduled content
community.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Run your community like a pro
marketplace.long_description:
The all-in-one toolkit for WhatsApp community managers. Replace GoHighLevel, Periskope, and CommuniPass with a single bot that lives inside your chat.

**Gamification** — Award points for activity. Members level up from Newcomer to Legend. Leaderboards drive engagement without you lifting a finger.

**Moderation** — Keyword filters, spam detection, warning system, auto-kick. Set it and forget it.

**Onboarding** — New members automatically get a welcome DM when they join.

**Roles** — Create custom roles (Moderator, VIP, Mentor) and assign them to members.

**Analytics** — Track active members, engagement rates, and activity trends.

**Scheduled Content** — Daily tips, weekly digests, recurring announcements.

**Why $49/mo?** — Communities using GoHighLevel pay $97-497/mo. Periskope charges $20-30/seat. CommuniPass is $199/mo. CupBots Community gives you everything at a fraction of the cost, running natively inside WhatsApp.

contacts.name: contacts
contacts.description: Personal CRM — track contacts, tiers, interactions, and follow-ups
contacts.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Personal CRM with tiered contacts and follow-up reminders
marketplace.long_description: Track your professional network right from WhatsApp. Add contacts, assign importance tiers, log interactions, and get nudged when it's time to follow up. Fuzzy name search and tagging make it easy to find anyone in seconds.

daily_briefing.name: daily_briefing
daily_briefing.description: Automated morning briefing with today's agenda
daily_briefing.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Get your daily agenda delivered every morning
marketplace.long_description: Receive a clean summary of today's calendar events each morning in WhatsApp. No need to open your calendar app — your agenda comes to you so you can plan your day at a glance.

faq.name: faq
faq.description: Trainable Q&A bot — add FAQ entries, fuzzy search, auto-answer in groups
faq.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Instant answers from your knowledge base
marketplace.long_description: Train a Q&A bot for your group in seconds. Add question-answer pairs and let the bot auto-reply when members ask common questions. Fuzzy search finds the best match even when the question isn't worded exactly. Toggle auto-answer mode so the bot proactively answers without needing /faq — like having a 24/7 support agent in your group.

ideas.name: ideas
ideas.description: Capture and review ideas organized by year
ideas.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Capture ideas the moment they strike, review later
marketplace.long_description: Don't let good ideas slip away. Jot down thoughts instantly from WhatsApp and review them organized by year. Great for founders and creators who need a frictionless way to build an idea backlog.

knowledgebase.name: knowledgebase
knowledgebase.description: Upload documents and search them with AI — PDF, DOCX, TXT supported. Replaces FAQ with semantic search.
knowledgebase.author: CupBots

config.label: Chunker API Key
config.help: API key for the Chunker RAG service

marketplace.tagline: Turn your docs into an instant AI knowledge base
marketplace.long_description: Upload PDFs, Word docs, and text files to build a searchable knowledge base for your group. Ask questions in plain language and get AI-powered answers with source citations. Tag documents for organized filtering. Enable auto-answer mode and the bot proactively answers member questions from your uploaded documents — like having a support agent that actually read the manual.

marketplace.tagline: Deploy landing pages from WhatsApp in minutes
marketplace.long_description: Describe your landing page in plain text and get a live site deployed instantly. Edit headlines, swap sections, connect custom domains, and check analytics — all without leaving WhatsApp. Ideal for launching MVPs and marketing pages fast.

mailwatch.name: mailwatch
mailwatch.description: Watch email inboxes and process messages with rules — keyword, regex, attachment, or AI matching with actions like notify, CRM update, calendar import, and draft replies

config.label: WhatsApp Notification Chat
config.help: WhatsApp JID to send notifications to

marketplace.tagline: Turn your inbox into an automation engine
marketplace.long_description: Watch your email inbox and process messages automatically based on rules you define. Match emails by keyword, regex, attachment type, or AI classification. Actions include WhatsApp notifications, CRM updates, calendar imports, and AI-drafted replies. Set up rules like 'any email from @acme.com with an invoice attachment -> notify me' and let the bot handle the rest.

marketplace.tagline: Publish markdown notes to the web from WhatsApp
marketplace.long_description: Turn WhatsApp messages into published web pages on mdpubs.com. Write in markdown, add tags, and share a public link instantly. Perfect for quick blog posts, meeting notes, or internal knowledge base articles.

note.name: note
note.description: Create and list zk-format markdown notes
note.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Create Zettelkasten-style notes from WhatsApp
marketplace.long_description: Capture thoughts as structured markdown notes in Zettelkasten format. Each note gets a timestamped filename and frontmatter, ready for your PKM workflow. Browse recent notes without leaving the chat.

notion.name: notion
notion.description: Connect Notion pages and databases to WhatsApp
notion.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Read, update, and sync Notion databases from WhatsApp
marketplace.long_description: Connect your Notion workspace to WhatsApp. Link databases and pages, search and update entries, and schedule automatic summaries. Perfect for CRM lookups, meeting notes, and weekly huddle digests.

onboarding.name: onboarding
onboarding.description: Welcome new members with guided setup wizard, custom messages, rules, and DM welcomes
onboarding.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Automated welcome messages and onboarding for new members
marketplace.long_description: Greet new group members automatically with custom welcome messages, group rules, and optional DM introductions. Configure delays, enable self-introductions, and preview everything with a guided setup wizard.

reddit.name: reddit
reddit.description: AI-curated daily digest from your tracked subreddits — actionable insights, tech trends, and fun finds
reddit.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: AI-curated Reddit digest delivered to your chat
marketplace.long_description: Track subreddits by category (signal, tech, finance, fun) and get a daily AI-curated digest delivered to WhatsApp. The AI extracts actionable business insights from startup subs, highlights notable tech launches, and picks the best fun posts — so you get the signal without the scroll. Pair with /schedule for automated daily delivery.

remind.name: remind
remind.description: Set reminders with natural language time parsing
remind.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Set reminders with natural language like '2h' or 'friday 3pm'
marketplace.long_description: Never forget a follow-up again. Set reminders using natural time expressions — relative (30m, 2h, 1d) or absolute (friday 3pm, march 25). List and manage pending reminders from any chat.

search.name: search
search.description: Multi-platform research across Reddit, YouTube, and X
search.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Search Reddit, YouTube, and X from one command
marketplace.long_description: Run research across multiple platforms without switching apps. Search Reddit, YouTube, and X/Twitter simultaneously or individually and get results summarized right in your chat. Great for market research and trend tracking.

stripe.name: stripe
stripe.description: Stripe subscriptions — auto-invite paying customers to your WhatsApp community
stripe.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Auto-invite Stripe customers to your WhatsApp community
marketplace.long_description: Connect Stripe to your WhatsApp community for automated onboarding. When a customer pays, they automatically receive a WhatsApp DM with your community invite link. Monitor subscriber stats and test the flow from chat.

upload.name: upload
upload.description: Auto-save files sent to the group
upload.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Auto-save files, photos, and videos sent to any group
marketplace.long_description: Every file shared in the group is automatically saved and organized. Specify a folder in the caption to sort files on the fly. Browse recent uploads anytime with a single command.

whatsapp.name: whatsapp
whatsapp.description: Control WhatsApp from Telegram — read, reply, search, summarize
whatsapp.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Read, reply, search, and summarize WhatsApp from your bot
marketplace.long_description: Manage your WhatsApp inbox without picking up your phone. Read recent messages, reply to conversations, search across all chats, and get AI-powered summaries. Includes QR pairing and reconnect controls.

whatsapp_schedule.name: whatsapp_schedule
whatsapp_schedule.description: Schedule WhatsApp messages with AI-parsed natural language
whatsapp_schedule.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Schedule WhatsApp messages with natural language timing
marketplace.long_description: Type who, what, and when in plain English and the bot handles the rest. Schedule messages to any contact or group using AI-parsed time expressions. List and cancel pending messages anytime.

xdigest.name: xdigest
xdigest.description: AI market intelligence from your X/Twitter list — product signals, business ideas, distribution levers
xdigest.author: CupBots

config.label: X Browser Cookies (JSON)
config.help: Playwright storage_state JSON — export from 'Get cookies.txt LOCALLY' extension

marketplace.tagline: Turn your X feed into a market intelligence briefing
marketplace.long_description: Point it at any X/Twitter list and get an AI-generated market opportunity map. The analysis identifies product launches with real traction, extracts business ideas from builder complaints, maps distribution channels, and surfaces contrarian takes most founders miss. Five-lens framework: Product Intelligence, Business Ideas, Distribution Playbook, Friction Map, and Mental Models.

youtube.name: youtube
youtube.description: Analyze YouTube videos — transcript extraction + AI summary
youtube.author: CupBots

marketplace.tagline: Get AI summaries of any YouTube video in seconds
marketplace.long_description: Paste a YouTube link and get a full transcript extracted and summarized by Claude. Ask follow-up questions about the video content. Ideal for quickly digesting long talks, tutorials, and interviews without watching.
